title: Operation Begins
description: US-Israel joint strikes on Iranian nuclear facilities and IRGC command centers

title: Iran Retaliates
description: Ballistic missile salvo targeting US bases in Qatar and UAE

title: Hormuz Strait Closure
description: IRGC Navy mines and fast-boat operations disrupt tanker traffic

title: Hezbollah Barrage
description: Hezbollah launches coordinated rocket attacks on northern Israel

title: Oil Spikes $140
description: Brent crude surges past $140/bbl on Hormuz disruption fears

title: UNSC Emergency Session
description: UN Security Council convenes emergency session; Russia and China call for ceasefire

title: Houthi Attacks Red Sea
description: Houthi anti-ship missiles target commercial vessels in Bab el-Mandeb

title: Iraq PMU Strikes
description: Iran-backed PMU forces attack US forces at Al-Asad Airbase

title: Natanz Facility Destroyed
description: Second wave of strikes confirms destruction of Natanz enrichment centrifuges

title: EU Sanctions Package
description: European Union enacts comprehensive sanctions on Iranian oil and banking sectors

title: Refugee Crisis Escalates
description: UNHCR reports 500,000+ internally displaced in Iran; border crossings overwhelmed

title: Damascus Hit
description: Israeli strikes target Iranian military advisors in Damascus suburbs

title: China Mediation Offer
description: China proposes ceasefire framework; calls for immediate cessation of hostilities

title: Infrastructure Crisis
description: Iran reports widespread power grid failures; hospitals on emergency generators

title: US Carrier Strike
description: USS Eisenhower carrier group engages IRGC fast boats in Persian Gulf

title: Nowruz Ceasefire Call
description: Iranian officials propose 72-hour Nowruz ceasefire; US demands preconditions

title: Cyber Attacks Surge
description: Widespread cyber operations target banking and infrastructure in Iran and Israel

title: Humanitarian Corridor
description: Red Cross negotiates limited humanitarian corridors for medical supplies

title: OPEC Emergency Meeting
description: OPEC+ emergency session discusses production surge to stabilize markets

title: Escalation Warning
description: Iran threatens to target Gulf state oil facilities if strikes continue
